assertion_results.evidence: File exists at /tmp/define-feature-eval-baseline/eval-5/outputs/api-claim-verification.md and contains 35 lines of content.

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains the detected claim text (e.g., 'PR reviews cannot be updated' or 'does not support modifying a submitted review')
assertion_results.evidence: Line 8: '"PR reviews cannot be updated after initial submission so always create a new review"' and Line 9: '"The GitHub API does not support modifying a submitted review"'

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains a reference to the GitHub REST API endpoint PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id} or equivalent evidence that the claim is incorrect
assertion_results.evidence: Line 20: '**`PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id}`**' and Line 14: 'The claim is **incorrect**. The GitHub REST API does support updating a submitted pull request review.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/api-claim-verification.md contains suggested corrected language for the Requirement
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 28-34 under '### Suggested Corrected Language' provide corrected requirement: '"Update the existing PR review when re-running evals on the same PR, rather than creating duplicate reviews"' and corrected notes: '"Use `PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pull_number}/reviews/{review_id}` to update an existing review in place"'
